title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build agentic AI applications using Claude Code across three interfaces: Desktop App, Terminal CLI, and VS Code integration. The example project is an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator that personalizes documents and provides skill suggestions using the Anthropic API.
